channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Linda Mtoba Reflects on Her Masked Singer SA Journey and Motherhood
item.description: Linda Mtoba, a South African actress known for her roles in 'Isibaya', 'The River', and 'Queendom', revealed that her six-year-old daughter was the driving force behind her participation in season thr...

item.title: ICE agents shoot and kill driver in Maine after vehicle attempt to strike officer
item.description: Federal immigration agents shot and killed a driver in Biddeford, Maine, according to a state official and a witness. The incident, which occurred on a street intersection, involved ICE agents in gree...

item.title: Family Reflects on Positive Changes After Returning to Kenya
item.description: A family that relocated from the US to Kenya 14 months ago is sharing how their lives have transformed. They left behind the comforts of American life to provide their children with a richer upbringin...

item.title: Doctor Killed in Robbery Incident Near Teen Talwar in Karachi
item.description: A 28-year-old doctor, Akash, was killed during a robbery incident near Teen Talwar in Karachi. The incident involved suspected robbers and a bank security guard. Akash was withdrawing cash from a bank...

item.title: PDP urges Bayelsa Gov to tackle hunger, unemployment over stadium project
item.description: The People's Democratic Party (PDP) has strongly criticized Bayelsa State Governor, Douye Diri, for prioritizing a N100 billion stadium project over addressing critical social issues like hunger, unem...

item.title: Court Dismisses Sowore's Request to Postpone Cyberbullying Trial
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja has rejected Omoyele Sowore's application to delay his trial over alleged cyberbullying of President Bola Tinubu. Sowore's lawyer, Raphael Adakole, argued that the defe...

item.title: Tate Modern exhibition celebrates Ana Mendieta’s enduring artistic vision and influence
item.description: This review examines Tate Modern’s major exhibition dedicated to Cuban-American artist Ana Mendieta, presenting it as a compelling exploration of one of the most original artistic voices of the late t...

item.title: Africa's Trade Diversification Amid AGOA Uncertainty
item.description: The African Growth and Opportunity Act (AGOA), which has been a cornerstone of U.S.-Africa trade relations for 25 years, faces unprecedented uncertainty after being renewed for just one year. This sho...

item.title: South Carolina Faces Political Uncertainty Following Senator Lindsey Graham's Death and Special Election Preparations
item.description: The death of Senator Lindsey Graham has triggered a political upheaval in South Carolina, prompting Governor Henry McMaster to appoint a temporary replacement for the Senate seat until January. A spec...

item.title: Trump Announces Hormuz Blockade, Faces Scrutiny Over Interview Conduct and ICE Shooting
item.description: President Donald Trump's recent remarks and actions have sparked significant political and legal scrutiny. During an interview with NBC's Meet the Press, Trump abruptly cut off a question about the St...

item.title: Paul Gallen questions whether NRL clubs should pursue Jarome Luai for the 2027 season following his Wests Tigers exit
item.description: Former NRL player Paul Gallen has cautioned clubs against attempting to sign Jarome Luai for the 2027 season, citing the reported deterioration of Luai's relationship with the Wests Tigers before his ...

item.title: Jovial apologizes after DNA test clears Otile of paternity
item.description: Kenyan musician Jovial has publicly apologized to singer Otile Brown following revelations that a DNA test ruled out Otile as the biological father of one of her children. The apology came after Otile...

item.title: Tanzania faces delays in $420 million gas-to-liquid plant due to gas supply concerns
item.description: Tanzania's $420 million gas-to-liquid (GTL) plant project, backed by Canadian firm Rocky Mountain GTL and local partners, faces delays as it awaits a gas supply agreement with the Tanzania Petroleum D...

item.title: Renaissance and Indorama ink 16-year gas pact to support Nigeria's fertiliser industry
item.description: Renaissance Africa Energy Company Limited has signed a landmark 16-year gas supply agreement with Indorama Fertiliser FZE, securing a steady feedstock for one of Nigeria's largest fertilizer producers...

item.title: Australia's EV Charger Strategy: Quality Over Quantity
item.description: The article discusses Australia's approach to expanding electric vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure, highlighting a strategic advantage in learning from global leaders while prioritizing quality ove...

item.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalates with Attacks on Gulf Nations and Hormuz Strait
item.description: The article details the ongoing military confrontation between the United States and Iran, which has intensified with recent attacks on Gulf states and the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz. Follow...

item.title: Democrats Criticize Lindsey Graham's Legacy Amid Posthumous Tributes
item.description: Following the unexpected death of U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, Democratic colleagues expressed tributes to his career, highlighting his humor and negotiation skills. However, critics argue these tribu...

item.title: Ram Temple Trust to Appoint First CEO to Address Management Issues and Embezzlement Concerns
item.description: The Sri Ram Janmabhoomi Tirath Kshetra Trust has announced the search for its first chief executive officer (CEO) to professionalize the management of the Ram Mandir complex following allegations of e...

item.title: Ontario Faces Uncertainty Over $8M U.S. Alcohol Stockpile
item.description: The Ontario government continues to store nearly $80 million worth of U.S. alcohol in its warehouses, with taxpayers spending approximately $8 million on storage costs. CBC News obtained internal reco...

item.title: Malawian Woman Accused of R10 Million Theft in South Africa
item.description: A 28-year-old Malawian woman, identified as Fatima Lawerence (also known as Esther), is being sought by South African authorities following an alleged theft from her employer's residence in Durban. Th...
